name: Polish Reuben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 21 1/2 oz Condensed cream of mushroom soup
1 1/2 lb Polish sausage, fully cooked, cut into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine soup, milk, onion and mustard in a medium bowl; blend well.
2. Spread sauerkraut in a greased 13 x 9 inch pan.
3. Top with uncooked noodles.
4. Spoon the soup mixture evenly over top.
5. Top with sausage, then cheese.
6. Combine crumbs and butter in a small bowl; sprinkle over top.
7. Cover pan tightly with foil.
8. Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for 1 hour or until noodles are tender.
9. Garnish as desired.
